title: Here Comes the Rain Again
meaning_summary: Here Comes the Rain Again still earns because it remains one of Eurythmics' most durable mood-driven songs and continues to fit both synth-pop and adult-pop nostalgia listening.
revenue_drivers: The track holds long-tail value through 1980s and new-wave playlist use.
Its atmosphere supports recurrent media and soundtrack-style reuse.
Writer participation strengthens the artist-side economics of replay.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes durable playlist placement, strong song identity, and lighter but steady sync-style reuse.

ownership.publishing_owner: writer / publisher split with strong creator participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out song position
ownership.notes: Artist-side range is modeled, not disclosed by rightsholders.
